"[11] [Appended, 01:07:37] [1] A user is requesting emergency services from an Apple device via satellite. Transmit and receive times may be longer than for cellular SMS. User responses may be delayed due to satellite movements. The user CANNOT MAKE OR RECEIVE A VOICE CALL because they are outside cellular coverage. At 08:00AM UTC, A USER requested emergency services near these coordinates: Latitude 37.0995 (N), Longitude -122.2831 (W).4 minsThis request is for MULTIPLE PEOPLE. The specific emergency is VEHICLE PROBLEM. The person in need IS LOCKED IN OR LOCKED OUT OF A VEHICLE. The user's iPhone has its region set to UNITED STATES. The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH. PSAP systems may not render emojis/special characters correctly. Return messages will not be affected. Two-way text with the user is now available.4 minsResponders may need to search an area extending at least 10 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user. The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is -25 meters. Responders may need to search 10 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user. Enhanced Emergency Data may be available. QUERY ADDITIONAL DATA! The user's device battery state is 11-30%. Their verified phone number is +18312840138. The user requests help with a CAR OR VEHICLE ISSUE emergency.4 minsApple Systems The user's device sent a location update: Latitude 37.0994 (N), Longitude -122.2830 (W). Search area +/-30 meters. Altitude 2 meters. Search height +/-40 meters. The user's device battery state is 11-30%.4 minsSYSTEM: We received your 9-1-1 text message. You can wait for the next available call taker or you can CALL 9-1-1.4 minsThis Emergency SOS via satellite session was transferred to the Emergency Relay Center because no PSAP response was received. You may receive or have received a relay voice call for an incident with this same location data. Please verify that your TCC connection and text handling systems are functioning normally, and that dispatchers are logged in to receive texts to avoid relay fallback for future Emergency SOS via satellite sessions. To reach the Emergency Relay Center call 620-317-0404 or toll-free 855-251-2181.4 mins(831) 284-0138Madison Laird has joined the chat911 WHAT ARE YOU REPORTING4 minsMadison LairdSYSTEM: Delivery Status: Failed to deliver message to the SMSC, System stopping further retries.3 mins(831) 284-0138WHAT KIND OF VEHICLE ARE YOU IN?2 minsMadison LairdSYSTEM: Delivery Status: Failed to deliver message to the SMSC, System stopping further retries.2 mins(831) 284-0138Send mess"
